mapper.select: SELECT c.relname AS table_name, a.attname AS column_name, d.description AS column_comment FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = c.oid LEFT JOIN pg_description d ON d.objoid = a.attrelid AND d.objsubid = a.attnum WHERE c.relkind = 'r' AND n.nspname = 'public' AND a.attnum > 0 AND NOT a.attisdropped and c.relname = #{tableName} ORDER BY c.relname, a.attnum;
mapper.insert: insert into sys_audit_trail ( audit_sys_id, audit_flag , ref_key , menu_cd , table_nm , audit_trail_contents , insert_datetime , insert_user_id , sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{audit.auditSysId}, #{audit.auditFlag}, #{refKey}, #{audit.menuCd}, #{audit.tableNm}, #{audit.auditTrailContents}, now(), #{userId}, #{sysPlantCd} )

insert into sys_audit_trail ( audit_sys_id, audit_flag , ref_key , menu_cd , table_nm , audit_trail_contents , insert_datetime , insert_user_id , sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.auditSysId}, #{item.auditFlag}, #{item.refKey}, #{item.menuCd}, #{item.tableNm}, #{item.auditTrailContents}, now(), #{userId}, #{sysPlantCd} )

insert into sys_audit_trail ( audit_sys_id, audit_flag , ref_key , menu_cd , table_nm , audit_trail_contents , insert_datetime , insert_user_id , sys_plant_cd ) values ( #{audit.auditSysId}, #{audit.auditFlag}, #{refKey}, #{audit.menuCd}, #{audit.tableNm}, #{audit.auditTrailContents}, now(), #{userId}, #{sysPlantCd} )

insert into sys_audit_trail ( audit_sys_id, audit_flag , ref_key , menu_cd , table_nm , audit_trail_contents , insert_datetime , insert_user_id , sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.auditSysId}, #{item.auditFlag}, #{item.refKey}, #{item.menuCd}, #{item.tableNm}, #{item.auditTrailContents}, now(), #{userId}, #{sysPlantCd} )

insert into sys_audit_trail ( audit_sys_id, audit_flag , ref_key , menu_cd , table_nm , audit_trail_contents , insert_datetime , insert_user_id , sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.auditSysId}, #{item.auditFlag}, #{item.refKey}, #{item.menuCd}, #{item.tableNm}, #{item.auditTrailContents}, now(), #{userId}, #{sysPlantCd} )
